chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 394 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.20 2. For orders on CMA No.1469/2019 3. For hearing of main case 17.10.2025 Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for the applicant Learned counsel states that this reference is against the order in rectification application, whereas, the reference against the original judgment is pending. Upon being confronted as to how this reference could be entertained pertaining to rectification order, he sought that this reference application may be permitted to be withdrawn and reference against the original judgment be decided uninfluenced. Order accordingly. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
